title: Meta_Kim Validation Contract
description: Declarative validation rules extracted from hardcoded prompts. Replaces 60% of agent-embedded validation logic with a single source of truth.

meta.purpose: Extract validation rules from agent prompts into declarative contract. Enables: (1) Single source of truth for validation logic, (2) Testable validation without LLM, (3) Easy rule updates without prompt changes, (4) Multi-language error messages.
meta.migrationPath: Phase 1: Create contract + validator runner. Phase 2: Migrate EB-005/EB-008/EB-004 rules. Phase 3: Add rule testing framework. Phase 4: Declarative rule extensions.
meta.extensionMechanism: New rules added via config/contracts/validation-rules/*.json. Each rule file declares: ruleId, severity, check condition, error message key.

ruleRegistry.description: Central registry of all validation rules. Each rule has a unique ID, severity, check definition, and error message.

EB-005-fabricated-verification.description: Workers claiming verification pass counts must provide workerExecutionEvidence with status='verified' and actualOutput. Empty evidence or fabricated claims = FAIL.
EB-005-fabricated-verification.fixAction: Add workerExecutionEvidence entry with actual command output, exitCode, commandRanAt timestamp, and correct successMarkerFormat.

EB-008-silent-success-ambiguity.description: Distinguish silent-success commands (node --check, tsc --noEmit) from fabricated empty evidence via successMarkerFormat enum.
EB-008-silent-success-ambiguity.fixAction: Set successMarkerFormat to 'exit-code-only' for silent-success commands, 'stdout-text' for output-producing commands, or 'json-output' for JSON results.

EB-004-nested-pre-decision-frame.description: preDecisionOptionFrame must be normalized to avoid nested spine state. choiceSurfaceState should live in ONE location.
EB-004-nested-pre-decision-frame.fixAction: Run scripts/migrate-spine-state-eb004.mjs to normalize nested preDecisionOptionFrame structure.

PRIN-01-configurable.description: Agent output must use configuration-driven behavior, not hardcoded values.
PRIN-01-configurable.fixAction: Reference config.value or environment variable lookup instead of hardcoded literal.

PRIN-02-single-source.description: Each data/logic item has exactly one authoritative source.
PRIN-02-single-source.fixAction: Consolidate duplicate definitions into single source; import/reference from other locations.

dispatch-envelope-completeness.description: dispatchEnvelopePacket must have all required fields before worker dispatch.
dispatch-envelope-completeness.fixAction: Populate all required dispatchEnvelopePacket fields before worker dispatch.

role-display-name-business-readable.description: roleDisplayName must be business-readable role-family names, not runtime aliases.
role-display-name-business-readable.fixAction: Use coarse English business role-family name. Put scope in roleInstanceId/shardScope/task text.

worker-task-file-completion-list.description: Workers must report every promised file with explicit status in fileCompletionList.
worker-task-file-completion-list.fixAction: Populate fileCompletionList with one entry per file in scopeFiles. Include skipReason for skipped/failed entries.

capability-gap-packet-required.description: capabilityGapPacket required when owner creation/upgrade needed or role coverage fails.

triggerConditions.condition: agentBlueprintPacket.roleCoverageGate === 'fail' AND agentBlueprintPacket.missingRoles is not empty

capability-gap-packet-required.fixAction: Create capabilityGapPacket with required fields when owner creation/upgrade is needed.

errorMessages.description: Multi-language error messages. Keys reference rule IDs.

EB-005-fabricated-verification.en-US: Fabricated verification claim detected. Worker reported test pass counts without workerExecutionEvidence entry containing actualOutput. Command: {command}, Claimed: {passClaim}
EB-005-fabricated-verification.zh-CN: 检测到伪造验证声明。Worker 报告测试通过数量但未提供包含 actualOutput 的 workerExecutionEvidence 条目。命令：{command}，声明：{passClaim}
EB-005-fabricated-verification.technical: workerResultPacket.workerExecutionEvidence missing entry with command='{command}' AND status='verified' AND non-empty actualOutput (when successMarkerFormat='stdout-text').

EB-008-silent-success-ambiguity.en-US: Ambiguous silent-success evidence. Command '{command}' has empty actualOutput but successMarkerFormat is not 'exit-code-only'. Cannot distinguish fabricated empty evidence from legitimate silent success.
EB-008-silent-success-ambiguity.zh-CN: 静默成功证据歧义。命令 '{command}' 的 actualOutput 为空但 successMarkerFormat 不是 'exit-code-only'。无法区分伪造的空证据与合法的静默成功。
EB-008-silent-success-ambiguity.technical: workerExecutionEvidence entry for command '{command}' has empty actualOutput but successMarkerFormat='{provided}'. Expected 'exit-code-only' with exitCode=0 and commandRanAt timestamp.

EB-004-nested-pre-decision-frame.en-US: Nested preDecisionOptionFrame detected. choiceSurfaceState appears in both spine state and preDecisionOptionFrame. Use scripts/migrate-spine-state-eb004.mjs to normalize.
EB-004-nested-pre-decision-frame.zh-CN: 检测到嵌套的 preDecisionOptionFrame。choiceSurfaceState 同时出现在 spine state 和 preDecisionOptionFrame 中。使用 scripts/migrate-spine-state-eb004.mjs 归一化。
EB-004-nested-pre-decision-frame.technical: preDecisionOptionFrame.choiceSurfaceState duplicates spine.state.choiceSurfaceState. Normalize to single location.

PRIN-01-configurable.en-US: Configurable principle violation: Hardcoded value '{value}' found at {location}. Use config.{key} or environment variable instead.
PRIN-01-configurable.zh-CN: 可配置原则违规：在 {location} 发现硬编码值 '{value}'。应使用 config.{key} 或环境变量替代。
PRIN-01-configurable.technical: Hardcoded literal violates PRIN-01. Expected config lookup.

PRIN-02-single-source.en-US: Single source principle violation: '{key}' defined in multiple locations: {locations}. Consolidate to single source.
PRIN-02-single-source.zh-CN: 单一来源原则违规：'{key}' 在多处定义：{locations}。合并为单一来源。
PRIN-02-single-source.technical: Duplicate definition violates PRIN-02. Define once, import elsewhere.

dispatch-envelope-completeness.en-US: dispatchEnvelopePacket missing required fields: {missingFields}. Cannot dispatch worker without complete envelope.
dispatch-envelope-completeness.zh-CN: dispatchEnvelopePacket 缺少必需字段：{missingFields}。无法在不完整的信封下调度 worker。

role-display-name-business-readable.en-US: roleDisplayName '{name}' violates business-readable naming convention. Must be coarse role-family name (e.g., 'frontend', 'backend'), not runtime alias ID or PascalCase.
role-display-name-business-readable.zh-CN: roleDisplayName '{name}' 违反业务可读命名规范。必须是粗粒度角色族名称（如 'frontend', 'backend'），不能是运行时别名 ID 或 PascalCase。
role-display-name-business-readable.technical: roleDisplayName must match /^[a-z]+(-[a-z]+)*$/. Use roleInstanceId/shardScope for scope detail.

worker-task-file-completion-list.en-US: workerTaskPacket promised {promisedCount} files in scopeFiles but fileCompletionList only reports {reportedCount}. Missing entries for: {missingPaths}.
worker-task-file-completion-list.zh-CN: workerTaskPromise 在 scopeFiles 中承诺 {promisedCount} 个文件但 fileCompletionList 仅报告 {reportedCount} 个。缺少条目：{missingPaths}。
worker-task-file-completion-list.technical: fileCompletionList coverage incomplete. Each scopeFiles entry requires corresponding fileCompletionList entry with path/action/status.

capability-gap-packet-required.en-US: capabilityGapPacket required but missing. Trigger condition: {trigger}. Conditions requiring gap packet: {conditions}
capability-gap-packet-required.zh-CN: capabilityGapPacket 必需但缺失。触发条件：{trigger}。需要 gap 包的条件：{conditions}
capability-gap-packet-required.technical: Missing capabilityGapPacket when ownerResolution=create_owner_first OR roleCoverageGate=fail with missingRoles OR upgradeReasons includes owner_creation_required.

critical.description: Must block workflow. Cannot proceed without fix.

high.description: Should fail review. Requires fix before public-ready.

medium.description: Warning with degradation notice. Fix recommended.

evidence-integrity.description: Rules verifying that claims are backed by actual evidence.

extensionMechanism.description: How to add new validation rules without modifying this contract file.

category.description: One of ruleCategories keys or new category

conditionTypes.enum-value: Check field value against allowed enum
conditionTypes.structural: Check structural patterns (no nesting, no duplication)
conditionTypes.coverage-check: Ensure source list fully covered by target
conditionTypes.conditional-required: Require packet based on trigger conditions
